name: Color Catch
description: Catch falling neon blocks with your color-changing paddle. Match colors for points, miss and lose a life. Speed ramps up as you score!
controls: ← → to change paddle color, mouse/touch to move paddle position

contributions.Novalystrix: Game concept, architecture, and full implementation
contributions.Elanor Brightloom: UI layout design — HUD with backdrop blur, neon-on-dark palette (electric blue, hot pink, lime, amber, violet), paddle as glowing pill, score/lives as top bar with colored dot lives
contributions.Míriel Goldthread: Visual theme (Neon Arcade) — block glow effects, wobble animation, catch flash + floating score popup, miss screen shake + red vignette, paddle glow intensity scaling with speed, block stretch effect at high speed
contributions.Narvi Irondeep: Logic review — identified 9 edge cases: simultaneous collision priority, color change mid-catch timing, speed cap, lives-at-zero guard, spawn rate scaling, paddle color wrap-around, off-screen block rules, minimum 2 colors
